final:
module divide_by_2 (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        q <= 0;
    end else begin
        q <= ~q;
    end
end

endmodule
